headline: Trump has discussed ousting Attorney General Pam Bondi, sources say
summary:
Trump privately mused about firing AG Pam Bondi and replacing her with EPA chief Lee Zeldin
Frustration stemmed from her handling of Epstein files and failure to prosecute political opponents
No decision made; Trump told CNN he had confidence in her the same day
market_title: Will Pam Bondi leaves as Attorney General before Apr 3, 2026?
market_event: When will Pam Bondi depart as Attorney General?
settlement_rules: If Pam Bondi leaves as Attorney General before Apr 3, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

headline: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
summary:
Trump was privately mulling firing AG Pam Bondi, with EPA chief Lee Zeldin floated as a replacement
Frustration centered on her handling of the Epstein files and failure to aggressively pursue Trump's political opponents
Trump publicly defended her but fired her the next day, with Deputy AG Todd Blanche taking over as acting AG

headline: Revealed: Mandelson failed vetting but Foreign Office overruled decision
summary:
Lord Peter Mandelson failed his security vetting before being named UK ambassador to the U.S., but the Foreign Office used a rare authority to overrule the decision
Downing Street said PM Keir Starmer and ministers were unaware of the override until that week; Deputy PM David Lammy said he would have blocked the appointment
Top Foreign Office civil servant Sir Olly Robbins was set to leave his post, and departments' rights to override vetting were suspended pending audit

headline: U.S. Captures Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro
summary:
U.S. military strikes across Venezuela culminated in the capture of President Nicolás Maduro and his wife, who were flown to New York to face narco-terrorism charges
Trump said he gave Maduro one last chance to step down in a private call before the raid, which followed months of CIA tracking and troop rehearsals on a model of his compound
Trump said the U.S. would "run" Venezuela until a transition, and secured a 50-million-barrel oil supply deal with the interim government

headline: Trump to announce Fed chair nominee Friday; Kevin Warsh may be his pick, according to reports
summary:
Speaking at the premiere for “Melania,” the film about first lady Melania Trump, the president said the five-month odyssey of finding his pick to succeed current Chair Jerome Powell is about to end.
The process for deciding on Powell’s replacement began in September with an 11-candidate field that included past and current Fed officials, economists and Wall Street investment professionals.
Former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh may be the pick, according to multiple reports, beating out Kevin Hassett, Christopher Waller and Rick Rieder.
